tasks.build: deno compile --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE --include plan.js --include plan.css --include plan-components.css --include map.js --include map.css --include themes --include llm_output_format.txt --include llm_uml_output_format.txt --output dist/matcha src/main.ts
tasks.install: deno task build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && cp dist/matcha ~/.local/bin/matcha
